title: PerfectReach
description: PerfectReach Mod, indicates perfect timings for your hits, so you can keep the perfect 3 block distance!
body:
# PerfectReach Mod
- Shows exact timing for perfect hits
- Helps maintain consistent 3-block reach
- Improves spacing and combo control
- Clean, simple indicator
- Designed for precise PvP encounters

Config menu supported with the Mod Menu Mod
